category: ALREADY ACKNOWLEDGED
resolution: The request has already been acknowledged.

category: Aadhaar number does not have mobile number.
resolution: Link a mobile number with the Aadhaar.
documentation: OTP authentication requires a linked mobile number.

category: Aadhaar suspended (Aadhaar is not in authenticatable status).(Your Aadhaar is suspended. Please approach nearest UIDAI Regional Office with valid POI Document.)
resolution: Visit the nearest UIDAI Regional Office.
next_step: Reactivate the Aadhaar using valid identity documents.
documentation: Authentication is blocked until Aadhaar is restored.

category: Biometric data did not match.
next_step: Capture a fresh fingerprint or iris scan.

category: Biometrics locked by Aadhaar number holder.
next_step: Use the UIDAI portal or mAadhaar application.
documentation: Biometric authentication has been disabled by the Aadhaar holder.

category: Buyer Name not accpted because of 3 repeatitions of a letter is not allowed
CONTACT SYSTEM ADMIN
Click on "Forget Pin" and update your pin first
resolution: Reset the PIN using the Forget PIN option.
next_step: Login again after updating the PIN.

category: DEALER NOT REGISTERED FOR DEVICE
resolution: Register the device for the dealer.
next_step: Contact the fertilizer company or administrator.
documentation: Device is not mapped to the dealer.

category: Device not registered with iFMS. Please contact fertilizer company
ERROR: LOCK PERIOD EXCEEDED
resolution: Wait until the lock period expires.

category: ERROR: Please Check DD Number You Entered
next_step: Enter the correct Demand Draft number.

category: ERROR: Txn Already Reversed
resolution: The transaction has already been reversed.

category: Error! Biometric Device did not send correct PID Data
resolution: Reconnect or restart the biometric device.

category: Exceeded Maximum OTP generation Limit. Try after N Mins
For input string

category: INSUFFICIENT STOCK

INVALID INTERFACE TYPE
INVALID MAC ADDRESS

Invalid value in the bs attribute of Bio element within Pid.

category: Invalid wadh element
resolution: Generate the request using a supported SDK.

category: MISSING_MOBILE_NO
resolution: Register a mobile number with Aadhaar.

NEW MOBILE NUMBER AND OLD MOBILE NUMBER SHOULD NOT MATCH

RECPT QTY EXCEEDS SALE QTY

next_step: Update the biometric SDK if necessary.

category: The attribute 'uid' of tag 'auth' is not a valid aadhaar number
next_step: Retry with a valid Aadhaar number.

category: The price/MRP must be same as the last two MRP entered by the company.
resolution: Use the same MRP configured by the company.

category: Txn Already Reversed

category: UIDAI Authentication services not reachable or timed out for response
UID_AUTHENTICATION_FAILED

category: You Have Been Logged Into Another Device.Your Session From This Device Is Expired.
resolution: Log in again on the current device.

documentation: Session invalidated due to another login.

category: You have exhausted the limit of getting updated pin on your mobile
resolution: Wait before requesting another PIN update.

category: You have exhausted the limit of varifying otp.Kindly generate another pin and try once again
Your QR code is not active yet
resolution: Activate the QR code before use.

category: org.hibernate.exception.ConstraintViolationException: could not execute statement
resolution: Review database constraints and transaction data.
